title: Wright
description: A minimal shader that improves lighting.
body:
# Wright


### This shader is archived, but you can use a better alternative that i made here:
- https://modrinth.com/shader/aerosol

Wright is a shader that corrects lighting and enhances colors.

- extremely fast and efficient near vanilla performance
- mixes all lights additively and makes it glow more
- faces pointing to sun moon or light sources are brighter
- increases contrast and saturation with gamma correction
- changes ambience to be realistic and cinematic
